entry.title: EU Digital Markets Act Enforcement Begins
entry.summary: Major technology platforms face new compliance requirements under landmark European regulation.

entry.title: AI Safety Standards Proposed by International Coalition
entry.summary: Thirty nations agree on voluntary framework for responsible artificial intelligence development.

entry.title: Semiconductor Supply Chain Diversification Efforts
entry.summary: Countries invest billions in domestic chip manufacturing capacity to reduce geopolitical risk.

entry.title: Data Privacy Frameworks Converge Across Jurisdictions
entry.summary: New bilateral agreements enable cross-border data flows while maintaining privacy protections.

entry.title: Open Source Security Initiative Gains Momentum
entry.summary: Industry consortium pledges funding and engineering resources to audit critical open-source infrastructure.
